elements.name: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login

steps.name: Verify the "World of Machines" screen should be displayed
the user clicks on Next again
Verify the "Accelerating Growth" screen should displayed
Verify the "Login to Your Account" screen should be visible
the user double taps on the APMS AI footer if needed

elements.name: Verify user is able to login successfully

steps.name: the user is on the login screen
Verify the user should be logged in successfully
verify that the "Account Preferences" screen is displayed
verify user navigates to "Activities" list screen
User has already created an Activity

elements.name: Search and open Edit Activity popup

steps.name: User taps on search input field
User clears existing text in search field
User enters newly created Activity Name
User waits for search results to load
system should display matching Activity results
User verifies Activity appears in list
User swipes Activity record from right to left
Activity ID should be visible and non-editable
Status should be visible and clickable
Activity Name field should be pre-filled and editable
Description field should be pre-filled and editable
"Is Function Applicable" toggle should be visible and editable
verify that the "Account Preferences" screen is displayed
verify user navigates to "Activities" list screen
User has already created an Activity
